name: golden-horse-server
description: Backend server for Golden Horse Shipping Services

scripts.db:reset: sequelize-cli db:drop && sequelize-cli db:create && sequelize-cli db:migrate && sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.db:test-connection: node -e "import('./src/models/index.js').then(({sequelize}) => sequelize.authenticate().then(() => { console.log('✅ Database connection successful'); process.exit(0); }).catch(err => { console.error('❌ Database connection failed:', err.message); process.exit(1); }))"
scripts.db:show-tables: node -e "import('./src/models/index.js').then(({sequelize}) => sequelize.showAllSchemas().then(schemas => { console.log('📊 Database schemas:', schemas); process.exit(0); }).catch(err => { console.error('❌ Error showing schemas:', err.message); process.exit(1); }))"
